blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,526 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: dry, highs of 41°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
